name: Business Portfolio
description: A minimalist agency/business portfolio template with hero, services, work, testimonial, and contact sections.

fields.label: Agency / Business Name
fields.hint: Your business name shown in the top navigation bar.

fields.label: Hero Badge Text
fields.hint: Small badge shown above the main headline.

fields.label: Hero Headline
fields.hint: The large headline in the hero section.

fields.label: Hero Description
fields.placeholder: We are a strategic design agency helping startups scale through clean code and minimalist aesthetics.
fields.defaultValue: We are a strategic design agency helping startups scale through clean code and minimalist aesthetics. Simple, effective, and built for growth.
fields.hint: Subtitle paragraph below the hero headline.

fields.label: About Section Label
fields.hint: Small uppercase label above the about quote.

fields.label: About Quote
fields.defaultValue: "We believe in simplifying complexity. Our mission is to provide clean, efficient, and scalable digital solutions."
fields.hint: The large quote in the About section.

fields.label: About Description
fields.placeholder: Founded in 2020, Agency has partnered with over 50 startups...
fields.defaultValue: Founded in 2020, Agency has partnered with over 50 startups to redefine their digital presence. We strip away the noise and focus on what matters: your product and your users.
fields.hint: Paragraph text below the about quote.

fields.label: Services Section Heading
fields.hint: Main heading of the Services section.

fields.label: Services Subheading
fields.placeholder: Comprehensive design and development solutions tailored to your specific needs.
fields.defaultValue: Comprehensive design and development solutions tailored to your specific needs.
fields.hint: Subtitle below the Services heading.

fields.label: Service 1 — Title
fields.hint: Title of the first service card.

fields.label: Service 1 — Description
fields.placeholder: Defining your visual identity and market positioning...
fields.defaultValue: Defining your visual identity and market positioning to ensure you stand out in a crowded digital landscape.
fields.hint: Description for the first service card.

fields.label: Service 2 — Title
fields.hint: Title of the second service card.

fields.label: Service 2 — Description
fields.placeholder: Creating intuitive, engaging, and accessible user experiences...
fields.defaultValue: Creating intuitive, engaging, and accessible user experiences that delight customers and drive conversion.
fields.hint: Description for the second service card.

fields.label: Service 3 — Title
fields.hint: Title of the third service card.

fields.label: Service 3 — Description
fields.placeholder: Building robust, responsive, and lightning-fast websites...
fields.defaultValue: Building robust, responsive, and lightning-fast websites using modern frameworks and best practices.
fields.hint: Description for the third service card.

fields.label: Work Section Heading
fields.hint: Heading of the portfolio/work section.

fields.label: Project 1 — Category
fields.hint: Category label for the first portfolio project.

fields.label: Project 1 — Title
fields.hint: Title of the first portfolio project.

fields.label: Project 1 — Description
fields.placeholder: Mobile application redesign focusing on accessibility.
fields.defaultValue: Mobile application redesign focusing on accessibility.
fields.hint: Short description for the first portfolio project.

fields.label: Project 2 — Category
fields.hint: Category label for the second portfolio project.

fields.label: Project 2 — Title
fields.hint: Title of the second portfolio project.

fields.label: Project 2 — Description
fields.placeholder: Complete brand identity and Shopify development.
fields.defaultValue: Complete brand identity and Shopify development.
fields.hint: Short description for the second portfolio project.

fields.label: Project 3 — Category
fields.hint: Category label for the third portfolio project.

fields.label: Project 3 — Title
fields.hint: Title of the third portfolio project.

fields.label: Project 3 — Description
fields.placeholder: Marketing site and user dashboard for developers.
fields.defaultValue: Marketing site and user dashboard for developers.
fields.hint: Short description for the third portfolio project.

fields.label: Testimonial Quote
fields.placeholder: Working with Agency transformed our business...
fields.defaultValue: "Working with Agency transformed our business. They took our chaotic vision and distilled it into a clean, effective product that our users absolutely love."
fields.hint: The featured client testimonial quote.

fields.label: Testimonial Author
fields.hint: Name of the person giving the testimonial.

fields.label: Testimonial Author Role
fields.hint: Job title / company of the testimonial author.

fields.label: Contact Section Heading
fields.hint: Main heading of the contact section.

fields.label: Contact Description
fields.placeholder: Let's discuss how we can help you build a better digital future.
fields.defaultValue: Let's discuss how we can help you build a better digital future. Reach out for a free consultation.
fields.hint: Paragraph below the contact heading.

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.hint: Email address shown in the contact section.

fields.label: Contact Phone
fields.hint: Phone number shown in the contact section.

fields.label: Contact Location
fields.hint: Location/city shown in the contact section.

fields.label: Footer Twitter Link Text
fields.hint: Label for the Twitter link in the footer.

fields.label: Footer LinkedIn Link Text
fields.hint: Label for the LinkedIn link in the footer.

fields.label: Footer Instagram Link Text
fields.hint: Label for the Instagram link in the footer.

fields.label: Footer Copyright Text
fields.hint: Copyright notice in the footer.
